name: lib-villain-reel
caption:
Signed, your missed call. 📞

Every call that rings out is a customer ringing your competitor next. Find out what it's costing you — free audit in bio.

#plumber #electrician #tradesbusiness #missedcalls #ukandireland

cards.headline: Hi. I'm your missed call.
cards.body: You've never heard me. That's the point.

cards.headline: This week I took 3 jobs.
cards.body: A boiler quote, a call-out, a rewire.

cards.headline: I fear one thing: someone who always picks up.
